response.justification: Candidate brings strong geospatial data pipeline expertise and distributed systems experience, but significant gaps exist: C++ proficiency is dated (last major work ~2018, 7+ years ago) while recent work centers on TypeScript/JavaScript, and there is no explicit experience building navigation/routing guidance systems. The role requires modern C++ as primary skill and navigation domain knowledge, both of which are weak points.
strengths: Deep geospatial data platform expertise as GISCollective founder with direct knowledge of geo-data processing and pipeline systems
Proven distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby building real-time systems handling millions of requests/second with asynchronous I/O and high-performance databases
Demonstrated senior-level engineering and learning agility across multiple languages and domains (C++, D, TypeScript, Java, Swift)
concerns: C++ experience is dated (last significant work ~2018); recent 5+ years focused on TypeScript/JavaScript, representing major skill recency gap for primary role requirement
No explicit experience building navigation/routing guidance systems or solutions, despite strong geospatial background in data collection and mapping
Recent roles emphasize product engineering and developer tooling rather than critical infrastructure design, operation, and pipeline reliability at scale
